title: At Home On the Street: People, Poverty, and a Hidden Culture of HomelessnessBy Jason Adam Wasserman and Jeffrey Michael ClairLynne Rienner Publishers. 2010. 252 pages. $58 cloth, $22.50 paper
abstract: At Home On the Street: People, Poverty, and a Hidden Culture of Homelessness By Jason Adam Wasserman and Jeffrey Michael Clair Lynne Rienner Publishers. 2010. 252 pages. $58 cloth, $22.50 paper Get access Steven Worden Steven Worden University of Arkansas Search for other works by this author on: Oxford Academic Google Scholar Social Forces, Volume 89, Issue 3, March 2011, Pages 1088–1091, https://doi.org/10.1093/sf/89.3.1088 Published: 01 March 2011
